title: Weapon Basics Guide
subtitle: CHOOSE YOUR STYLE
intro: This guide helps new players choose a weapon type without getting buried under raw data.
Start with comfort, rhythm, and consistency before chasing meta picks.

sections.title: How To Pick A Weapon
paragraphs: Pick the weapon type that makes you feel the most confident in normal fights.
A style that feels smooth will usually help you learn the game faster than a stronger style you do not enjoy.

sections.title: Weapon Choice Checklist
items: Notice whether you can dodge and reposition cleanly.
Make sure the weapon fits your stat plan.

sections.title: DANGER
sections.text: Do not lock yourself into a playstyle just because other players told you it is the best.
